canonical_answer: A woman in a red shirt stands in a kitchen with a red mixer. Triangular slices of fried bread soaked in creamy sauce are arranged on a white rectangular platter. The dish is garnished with slivered almonds, pistachios, and pink rose petals. A hand uses a golden spoon to scoop a portion of the dessert from the plate.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a woman in a red shirt smiles at the camera in a kitchen; at 4s, fried bread slices rest on a white platter garnished with nuts; at 12s, a blue graphic overlay displays text over the dish; at 16s, a hand holding a golden spoon scoops a portion of the food from the plate.
